sections.paragraph:
Original: זוּלה

Transliteration: zûlâh

Phonetic: zoo-law'

BDB Definition:

  1. a removal, a putting away (noun feminine)
  2. except, besides, with the exception of, with removal of (preposition)
  3. except that (conjunction)

Origin: from H2107

TWOT entry: 537a

Part(s) of speech:
